zh.lifeSummary: Miss. Bussel於1150年出生在英國英格蘭素斯 越可爾曼諾。她與Adam de Hoghton在英國英格蘭藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1192年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾享年42歲。

nameMeanings.name: Bussel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: from the genitive form of   Busse   1.

variants.name: Bussan
meanings: Americanized form of an unidentified German surname, most likely   Bussen  .
History: Felix Bussan, born in Germany, arrived in New York in 1897, on board the Normannia. Willy Bussan, born in Germany, left Hamburg on board the Deutschland and arrived in New York in 1907.

variants.name: Busse
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Ewald, Ernst, Fritz, Konrad, Claus, Eberhard, Eckhard, Frieda, Fritzi, Gerhard, Helmuth.
German: variant of   Buss  . This surname is also found in Poland. Compare   Bussey  .
North German (Büsse): metonymic occupational name for a maker of boxes and containers or for a gunsmith, from Middle Low German büsse, busse ‘box, gun, rifle’.

en.lifeSummary: Miss. Bussel was born in 1150, in Manor, South Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. She married Adam de Hoghton in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1192, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Miss. Bussel est née en 1150, à Manor, South Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Adam de Hoghton à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1192, à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 42 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Miss. Busselは1150年にイギリスイギリスソウス ヨークシュアイアマノーで生まれた。イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアでAdam de Hoghtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1192年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアで42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Miss. Bussel(은)는 1150년 영국 잉글랜드 소우스 요르크실르 먼어에서 태어났다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 Adam de Hoghton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1192년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Miss. Bussel родилась в 1150 г. в местности манор, соут еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Adam de Hoghton в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.
